name: Suryanandan Kumar
title: DevOps Engineer | Cloud Architect | AI & RAG Developer
tagline: Building reliable, automated infrastructure and intelligent AI systems.
bio: I am a DevOps and Cloud enthusiast focused on building reliable, automated infrastructure. I enjoy turning complex, manual workflows into clean, repeatable systems — whether that is a Dockerized application, a CI/CD pipeline, a cloud deployment on AWS, or an intelligent RAG-powered application. I combine DevOps practices with modern AI to build production-ready intelligent applications.
currently_building: Dockerized apps, CI/CD pipelines, RAG systems, and AWS cloud deployments.
currently_learning: Kubernetes advanced patterns, Terraform modules, advanced AWS architecture, and LLM application development.
open_to_collaborate: Open-source DevOps tools, cloud infrastructure automation, and AI/RAG projects.
ask_me_about: C++, SQL, Linux, Git, Docker, cloud deployment fundamentals, and RAG pipeline design.
quote: If something can be automated, I will script it — laziness is just efficiency in disguise.
contact_info: Reach Suryanandan via email at suryanandankumar2003@gmail.com, connect on LinkedIn at linkedin.com/in/suryanandan-kumar, or explore his code on GitHub at github.com/Suryanandankumar2003.
education_summary: Pursuing B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering from Sitamarhi Institute of Technology (Bihar Engineering University, Patna), graduating 2025. Completed 90-day AI DevOps Professional Training at Orbiqe Technologies Pvt. Ltd. sponsored by Bihar Skill Development Mission.
fun_facts: Believes automation is the highest form of engineering
Can write a Dockerfile faster than making coffee
Dreams in YAML and shell scripts
From Bihar, studying and working in Gurugram
availability: Open to remote and on-site opportunities in DevOps Engineering, Cloud Architecture, and AI/RAG development.
